views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's commute summary, weekly average duration ring, streak, cost meter, and quick-add FAB. Top card shows last commute with direction badge and duration. Below: stat grid (avg time, weekly cost, streak, best day). Progress ring compares today's total commute time against personal target.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick-log modal. Direction toggle (to/from) at top, large stepper for duration, transport mode horizontal picker with icons, route name text field with recent-route suggestions, departure time picker, traffic slider (1-5 with emoji faces), cost stepper, delay stepper, experience rating stars, optional notes.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Chronological list of all commutes grouped by date. Each row shows direction icon, duration, route, transport mode badge, and traffic color dot. Filter chips for direction and transport mode. Calendar heatmap colored by total daily commute time (green=short, red=long).

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Multi-section analytics: (1) Line chart of daily average commute time over 30 days with trend line. (2) Bar chart comparing average duration by day of week. (3) Pie chart of transport mode distribution. (4) Route efficiency table ranking routes by average time. (5) Departure time scatter plot vs duration. (6) Monthly cost trend bar chart. (7) AI-style insights list with icons.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCommutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All commute entries logged today, sorted by departure time

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotalMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of durationMinutes for all today's entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayRoundTripComplete
viewModelComputedProperties.description: True if today has both a toWork and fromWork entry

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverageMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily total commute minutes over the current Mon–Fri week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: previousWeekAverageMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Same metric for the prior week, used for trend comparison

viewModelComputedProperties.name: trendPercentageVsLastWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change: (thisWeek - lastWeek) / lastWeek * 100. Negative = improvement

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive weekdays (Mon–Fri) with at least one commute logged, ending today or yesterday

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time longest consecutive weekday logging streak

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageDurationByDirection
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average duration split by toWork vs fromWork across all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bestDayOfWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Day of week (Mon–Fri) with the lowest average total commute time, e.g. 'Wednesday'

viewModelComputedProperties.name: worstDayOfWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Day of week with the highest average total commute time

viewModelComputedProperties.name: routeRankings
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All unique routes ranked by average duration ascending, with trip count for confidence

viewModelComputedProperties.name: transportModeBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage distribution of entries across transport modes for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyTotalCostDollars
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of costCents / 100 for the current calendar month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyTotalHours
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all durationMinutes this month converted to hours

viewModelComputedProperties.name: yearlyTotalHours
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total commute hours logged this calendar year — the 'time cost of commuting' stat

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 30 days of average daily commute time for the line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dayOfWeekChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average commute by weekday (Mon–Fri) for bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: departureTimeScatterData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Departure time (decimal hour) vs duration for scatter plot — reveals optimal departure window

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageTrafficLevel
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean traffic rating across all entries, 1.0–5.0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction 0–1 of today's total commute time vs the daily target (lower is better, capped at 1.0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insightCards
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Dynamically generated list of actionable insights: fastest route, best departure time, cost trends, streak milestones, day-of-week tips, traffic pattern alerts

dailyGoal.description: Target maximum round-trip commute time per day in minutes. Progress ring fills as actual time approaches target — staying under is the goal. Green when under 80%, yellow 80-100%, red over target.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A streak day is any weekday (Monday–Friday) where at least one commute entry is logged. Weekends do not break streaks but do not count toward them. A streak resets if a weekday passes with zero entries.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary trend: compare this week's average daily round-trip time vs last week's. Secondary trends: monthly cost trajectory (rolling 4-week comparison), traffic level trend (are commutes getting worse?), transport mode shift over time. Departure time optimization: identify the departure window with statistically shortest commutes.
insights: Fastest route recommendation: 'Your [Route A] averages X min vs [Route B] at Y min — saving Z min per trip'
Optimal departure window: 'Leaving between 7:15–7:30 AM cuts your commute by ~8 min on average'
Day-of-week insight: 'Wednesdays are your fastest commute day (avg X min). Mondays are slowest (avg Y min)'
Weekly comparison: 'Your commute averaged X min/day this week — Y% faster than last week'
Monthly cost summary: 'You spent $X on commuting this month. At this rate, ~$Y/year'
Time cost awareness: 'You've spent X hours commuting this year — equivalent to Y full days'
Traffic correlation: 'When traffic is rated 4-5, your commute averages X min longer'
Transport mode insight: 'Public transit trips average X min vs driving at Y min on this route'
Streak milestone: 'You've logged commutes for X consecutive weekdays — personal best!'
Direction asymmetry: 'Your return commute averages X min longer than your morning commute'
